name: Running Man Thailand
original_name: รันนิ่งแมนไทยแลนด์ อย่า หยุด วิ่ง
overview: At the heart of the show are the 7 Main Agents, a powerhouse lineup of A-list stars who command massive, dedicated fanbases across the globe. They are ready to deliver multi-dimensional entertainment through intense competitions and challenging missions in every episode. Adding to the excitement, the show will feature an impressive roster of special guest stars, including Thailand’s top-tier artists and surprise guests flying in directly from South Korea, creating a truly dynamic entertainment phenomenon.

trailers.title: OFFICIAL TRAILER | iQIYI Original “Running Man Thailand อย่า หยุด วิ่ง”
